title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 194.010 - Shipment by common carrier, rules
text:
194.010.  Shipment by common carrier, rules. — The department of health and senior services shall issue regulations setting forth health and safety requirements for transporting dead human bodies that are placed on common carriers in the state of Missouri.
(RSMo 1939 § 9788, A.L. 2023 S.B. 116)
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9067; 1919 § 5823; 1909 § 6691
